headline: 'The Hoop Collective': Episodes of Brian Windhorst's NBA podcast
description: Here are the top highlights from Brian Windhorst's "The Hoop Collective" podcast, from breaking news to the latest intel and reaction from around the NBA.

headline: Trump accepts invite to attend NBA Finals Game 3 in New York
description: President Trump said Thursday that he has accepted an invitation from New York Knicks owner James Dolan to attend an NBA Finals game at Madison Square Garden next week.

headline: How the Jackals came to be a presence at Spurs games
description: How the Jackals came to be a presence at Spurs games

headline: Sources: NBA eyes interaction between Jalen Brunson, fans in Game 1
description: The NBA is investigating an interaction between Knicks star Jalen Brunson and courtside fans late in the fourth quarter of Game 1 of the NBA Finals, sources confirmed to ESPN.

headline: NBA championship and Finals MVP odds: Knicks, Brunson new favorites
description: The New York Knicks are now the championship favorites after their come-from-behind road victory over San Antonio in Game 1.

headline: Houston Rockets unveil new uniforms, updated logo
description: Houston's new uniforms call back to the "ketchup and mustard" era and pay tribute to the city's identity as a hub of the space program.

headline: Knicks take 1-0 lead into game 2 against the Spurs
description: New York Knicks (53-29, third in the Eastern Conference) vs. San Antonio Spurs (62-20, second in the Western Conference)
